privileged_info_summary: The task operates on the USLCI (US Life Cycle Inventory) Database, a real, publicly available database maintained and updated quarterly by NREL (National Renewable Energy Laboratory). The database contains verified truck transport processes, specifically 'Transport, combination truck, diesel powered' variants in long-haul and short-haul configurations. OpenLCA is confirmed to support both social indicators/aspects and JSON-LD export format. All metadata claims are correctly specified: indicator_name='Child Labor Risk', category_name='Human Rights', risk_value=1.5, comment_string='Sector Audit 2025', output_file='transport_social_risk.zip', and expected_path='/home/ga/LCA_Results/transport_social_risk.zip' are all consistent across the task definition, verification logic, and export scripts.
